chunk.text: Nickel and Cobalt Production in Madagascar S&C Draft of 5/26/10 John Hennig, Marketing 2 Ambatovy is a nickel and cobalt mining operation which is amongst the largest foreign investments in Madagascar to date Once fully operational, it will have the annual capacity to produce 60,000 tonnes of refined nickel, 5,600 tonnes of cobalt and 210,000 tonnes of ammonium sulphate Mine lifespan is approximately 30 years International Partners: Sherritt International Corp., Sumitomo Corp., Korean Resources Corp., SNC-Lavalin Inc. What is Ambatovy? Project Components • A mine and ore preparation plant • A 220 km slurry pipeline • A Plant site at Toamasina 3 Sites 4 Production and Forecast 2012 Production (100% basis) • Ni – 5,695 tonnes • Co – 493 tonnes 2013 Forecasted Production (100% basis) • Ni – 35,000 tonnes • Co – 3,000 tonnes 5 5 Vision 6 GOVERNANCE ENVIRONMENT SOCIAL Develop and operate a sustainable nickel and cobalt enterprise that… • significantly contributes to Madagascar, • delivers outstanding environmental, social & safety records, and • generates attractive economic returns. ECONOMIC
